arts.ttl: PSG to battle Premier League clubs for in-form Cunha
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are ready to take on Premier League clubs in the race to sign Matheus Cunha from Wolves. The French champions want to add to their attacking options in January and have been impressed by Cunha’s performances at Molineux. Cunha scored one and created another as Wolves beat Manchester United on Boxing Day and […] The post PSG to battle Premier League clubs for in-form Cunha first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: How to watch Tottenham vs Wolves - TV channel, live stream and kick off time
arts.sum: Tottenham return to Premier League action on Sunday afternoon when they take on Wolves. Tottenham's game with Wolves is scheduled to kick off at 3pm on Sunday, December 29 at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium.

arts.ttl: James Maddison for Son Heung-min and three Tottenham changes Postecoglou could consider vs Wolves
arts.sum: Yves Bissouma did replace Dragusin in the closing minutes of the game but Postecoglou's pre-match comments suggest that the Mali international won't be used there due to a lack of experience. Radu Dragusin's participation in the Wolves game is up in the air right now due to the ankle injury he suffered in the closing minutes of the Nottingham Forest match.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal, Tottenham hold talks with 25-year-old Premier League defender
arts.sum: Crystal Palace defender Tyrick Mitchell is attracting the attention of Europe’s leading clubs. Mitchell’s contract with Crystal Palace expires in June 2025 and the club is trying to tie him down to an extension. Sources have informed CaughtOffside that Mitchell is not keen on committing his long-term future to the club amid interest from multiple […] The post Exclusive: Arsenal, Tottenham hold talks with 25-year-old Premier League defender appeared first on CaughtOffside.
